synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-3337 Important: Oracle Linux 9 podman security update
description:
[5.6.0-14.0.1]
- Add devices on container startup, not on creation
- overlay: Put should ignore ENINVAL for Unmount [Orabug: 36234694]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117404]

[6:5.6.0-14]
- Rebuild for new golang to address CVE-2025-61726
- Resolves: RHEL-146869
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-3337

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3337.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
podman-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
podman-docker-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
podman-plugins-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
podman-remote-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
podman-tests-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
podman-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
podman-docker-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
podman-plugins-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
podman-remote-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
podman-tests-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/podman-5.6.0-14.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-61726
CVE-2025-61728
CVE-2025-61729
CVE-2025-68121




Description of changes:

[5.6.0-14.0.1]
- Add devices on container startup, not on creation
- overlay: Put should ignore ENINVAL for Unmount [Orabug: 36234694]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117404]

[6:5.6.0-14]
- Rebuild for new golang to address CVE-2025-61726
- Resolves: RHEL-146869
